applicability_boundary.admitted_family: Gaussian-OU toy world generated by the canonical runner.
applicability_boundary.metric_behavior_range: Reported for finite target metric values returned by the canonical quality envelope; saturation fails closed when adjacent confidence intervals are non-finite or absent.
applicability_boundary.model: Canonical tiny MLP encoder when available, with runner-managed fallback behavior.
applicability_boundary.negative_result_policy: Non-monotone and unsaturated outcomes are reported directly without changing the rho grid.

monotonicity_test.hypothesis: target metric mean is nondecreasing across the configured rho grid
monotonicity_test.negative_result_note: The configured rho grid and seed count are fixed before observing the outcome.

post_saturation_slope_ci.criterion: post-saturation linear slope 95% CI contains zero
